narrative:
Osnaburg township has 3,730 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points.
